# Traceability matrix (derived)

Derived from the registers; not hand-maintained. Every MVP requirement reaches
at least one decision, one work item, and one test; behaviour-bearing ones
reach an acceptance criterion.

| Req | Scope | Decisions | Work items | Tests | Acceptance | Coverage |
|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|
| FR-001 | MVP | DEC-001 | WBS-1.1 | TEST-001 | AC-001 | full |
| FR-002 | MVP | DEC-002, ADR-0001 | WBS-1.2 | TEST-002 | AC-002 | full |
| FR-003 | MVP | DEC-002 | WBS-1.3 | TEST-003 | AC-003 | full |
| NFR-001 | MVP | DEC-002 | WBS-1.4 | TEST-004 | AC-002 | full |
